Lu, Esq. of Sedgwick Detert, Oran & Arnold LLP (415) 781-7900, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Peter Bronstein, Esq. of the Law Office of Peter Bronstein, Appearing thru CourtCall, for Defendant and moving party.
